title: Unleash
description:
[gold]Osty[/gold] deals 6 damage.
Deals additional damage equal to [gold]Osty's[/gold] current HP.
upgraded_description:
[gold]Osty[/gold] deals 9 damage.
Deals additional damage equal to [gold]Osty's[/gold] current HP.
notes: Requires Osty to be alive. Additional damage equals Osty's current HP at the time of play.
